decisions.title: Use local-first architecture
decisions.decision: Keep the application local-first for privacy and simplicity.
decisions.rationale: The system manages personal operational and career data.
decisions.consequences: No cloud account or external service is required.

recommended_next_actions: Keep private data out of Git
